---

## OVERVIEW

VSL Fast Track 2018 is a compressed, action-oriented version of Jon Benson's VSL methodology. It focuses on the pre-VSL preparation phase (which Jon considers 80% of the work), hook creation, headline formulas, and funnel architecture including quiz funnels and upsell strategy. This is the 2018 snapshot of Jon's system before the NOWVSL 2020 expansion.

---

## SECTIONS

| # | Section | Focus |
|---|---------|-------|
| 1 | 5-Step Pre-VSL Checklist | Avatar doc, competitor analysis, mechanism, proof stack, offer wireframe |
| 2 | Hook Formula | Specific Result + Specific Timeframe + Unique Mechanism |
| 3 | 3X Hook Formula | 3 hooks (curiosity, fear, desire) tested via paid traffic |
| 4 | Enhanced Rapport Formula | Calculated vulnerability + relevant credential + specific empathy |
| 5 | Three Samurai Headline Formulas | "How To X Without Y", "The Secret of X That Y", "Warning: Don't X Until You Y" |
| 6 | Quiz-To-Sale Funnel | 5-7 question quiz that segments and pre-qualifies before VSL |
| 7 | Pre-Launch Strategy | 3-email sequence: teaser + reveal + countdown with open loops |
| 8 | Upsell & High-Ticket Architecture | Order bumps, upsell sequencing, high-ticket VSL paradox |

## KEY FRAMEWORKS

| Framework | Description | Layer |
|-----------|-------------|-------|
| 5-Step Pre-VSL Checklist | Avatar doc + competitor analysis + mechanism draft + proof stack + offer wireframe | L4 |
| Hook Formula | Specific Result + Specific Timeframe + Unique Mechanism = irresistible hook | L4 |
| 3X Hook Formula | Create 3 different hooks (curiosity, fear, desire) and split-test all via paid traffic | L5 |
| Enhanced Rapport Formula | Calculated vulnerability + relevant credential + specific empathy to avatar's problem | L4 |
| Three Samurai Headline Formulas | 3 proven templates: "How To X Without Y", "The Secret of X That Y", "Warning: Don't X Until You Y" | L5 |
| Quiz-To-Sale Funnel | 5-7 question quiz segments and pre-qualifies BEFORE the VSL — 40-60% conversion lift | L4 |
| Pre-Launch Sequence | 3 emails: teaser + reveal + countdown, each with open loop to next | L5 |

---

## KEY HEURISTICS

| Heuristic | Value | Domain |
|-----------|-------|--------|
| Pre-VSL work ratio | 80% of VSL success is determined before writing a single word | vsl-creation |
| Quiz length | 5-7 questions optimal — fewer feels shallow, more causes drop-off | funnel-strategy |
| Quiz conversion lift | 40-60% higher conversion vs direct-to-VSL | funnel-strategy |
| Order bump rule | Must be natural complement, not separate product ("fries with burger") | upsells |
| High-ticket VSL paradox | Less production, more conversion — casual 15min video beats $50K production | high-ticket-sales |
| Competitor research | Read 50 one-star reviews of competitor to find real market objections | market-research |
| 3 pricing options | Basic/Pro/Premium — majority picks middle, which should have best margin | pricing-strategy |
| Pre-launch emails | Exactly 3 emails before launch: teaser, reveal, countdown | pre-launch |
| Hook testing | Always test minimum 3 hooks before scaling any traffic | hooks |
